title: Measure SpO2 and Pulse Rate
description: The pulse oximeter shall accurately measure and display functional oxygen saturation (SpO2) and pulse rate.

verification.description: Verify measurement accuracy against calibrated simulator.

title: SpO2 measurement range
description: The device shall measure SpO2 in the range of 70% to 100%.

verification.description: Bench test with SpO2 simulator across full range.

title: Pulse rate range
description: The device shall measure pulse rate in the range of 30 to 250 bpm.

verification.description: Bench test with pulse rate simulator across full range.

title: Low SpO2 Alarm
description: The device shall trigger an alarm if SpO2 falls below a configurable threshold (default 90%).

verification.description: Simulate low SpO2 and verify alarm trigger.

title: Optical Sensor Interface
description: Connect the Optical Sensing subsystem to Signal Processing via an analog-to-digital interface.

verification.description: Verify schematic design and signal path.

title: Processed Data Interface
description: Transmit processed SpO2 and Pulse Rate data from Signal Processing to Display.

verification.description: Verify data transmission protocol and content.
